title: primula flava subsp. citrina
intro: Primula flava subsp. citrina, also known as the yellow-flowered primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the primrose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Primula flava subsp. citrina include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. It is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal properties.
